modelIdentification.name: JLVC-Engineering
modelIdentification.purpose: JLVC-Engineering provides Engineering components neccessary for use in the JLVC federation.
modelIdentification.description: This FOM module contains the objects and interactions necessary for Engineering communication in the JLVC Federation.
modelIdentification.useHistory: JLVC2024 - Draft 1 of the JLVC Modular FOM. Corrected octet datatype use. Removed redundant count parameter NumNodes from ObstacleUpdate.
JLVC2024 - JSJ7JLVC-21615: Replace Additional Octet Datatypes: Created GeotileID array. Changed Pointlist_3D_32: Field: EAC_GTRS_GEOTILE_IDENTIFICATION to use the new Geotile_ID array as dataType.
JLVC2024 - Updated version number from 2024 to 2.
JLVC2026 - Version 3: Updated reference dependencies to use the new RPRv3 module names.

reference.identification: SISO-STD-001.1-2025 - Real-time Platform Reference Base FOM Module
SISO-STD-001.1-2025 - Real-time Platform Reference Enumerations FOM Module
SISO-STD-001.1-2025 - Real-time Platform Reference Foundation FOM Module
SISO-STD-001.1-2025 - Real-time Platform Reference Physical FOM Module

objectClass.name: Engineering
objectClass.semantics: Base class for combat engineering data

attribute.name: disGuise
attribute.semantics: disguise assumed by object

attribute.name: force
attribute.semantics: force to which the entity belongs.

attribute.name: geometry
attribute.semantics: geometry of the entity. This could be a single location or an array of locations

attribute.name: guise
attribute.semantics: Identifies the entity type enumeration to be displayed by members of the force of the issuing entity.

attribute.name: Marking
attribute.semantics: Identifies any unique markings on the issuing entity.

attribute.name: emplacingUnit
attribute.semantics: unit accomplishing the engineering

objectClass.name: AVLB
objectClass.semantics: An armoured vehicle-launched bridge (AVLB) Engineering object

attribute.name: Strength
attribute.semantics: Percent strength of the bridge [0, 100]

attribute.name: Centerpoint
attribute.semantics: Center GCC location of checkpoint

attribute.name: GroundQueue
attribute.semantics: Parameters that define the ground traffic queue

attribute.name: HumanQueue
attribute.semantics: Parameters that define the human traffic queue

attribute.name: IsActive
attribute.semantics: Denotes if the checkpoint is currently operation and active

attribute.name: IsPerm
attribute.semantics: Denotes if the checkpoint is permenate or temporary

attribute.name: Orientation
attribute.semantics: DIS Entity orientation of the checkpoint

attribute.name: SearchLine
attribute.semantics: Polyline that defines the search line that when crossed a search will be performed

attribute.name: WaterQueue
attribute.semantics: Parameters that define the water traffic queue

attribute.name: concealingEntity
attribute.semantics: OPTIONAL. object which conceals the IED

attribute.name: defeatingEntity
attribute.semantics: OPTIONAL. object which defeats the IED

attribute.name: detectingEntity
attribute.semantics: OPTIONAL. object which detects the IED

attribute.name: deviceType
attribute.semantics: the type of IED

attribute.name: isConcealed
attribute.semantics: whether the IED is concealed or not

attribute.name: triggerType
attribute.semantics: the type of IED trigger

objectClass.name: Lanes
objectClass.semantics: Bounds the region breached by a mine-clearing entity.

attribute.name: appearance
attribute.semantics: characteristics of the lane

attribute.name: intersectedObjects
attribute.semantics: Optional. List of engineering objects intersected.

attribute.name: width
attribute.semantics: width of the Lane

objectClass.name: Markers
objectClass.semantics: Represent the flags placed on the boundary edges or down the middle of the cleared lane.

attribute.name: appearance
attribute.semantics: characteristics of the marker.

attribute.name: flag_orientations
attribute.semantics: flag orientation of each marker in radians.

attribute.name: num_markers
attribute.semantics: number of individual markers in this object

attribute.name: ActiveStatus
attribute.semantics: Identifies the active status of the minefield

attribute.name: Lane
attribute.semantics: Identifies whether the minefield has an active lane

attribute.name: MinefieldAppearanceType
attribute.semantics: Specifies the appearance inforation needed for displaying the symbology of the minefield as a doctrinal minefield graphic.

objectClass.name: Mines
objectClass.semantics: This object represents the individual mines within a minefield set.

attribute.name: classification
attribute.semantics: Only used for sea mines.

attribute.name: fuze
attribute.semantics: enumeration which defines the fuse type and delay for the munition.

attribute.name: mine_ids
attribute.semantics: local id of each individual mine in the mine set (Only used for sea mines). Cardinality "1+"

attribute.name: Name
attribute.semantics: An optional attribute naming the minefield.

attribute.name: Depth
attribute.semantics: Depth of mines in feet

attribute.name: MineLocation
attribute.semantics: Up to 10 points to describe a mine [field] polygon. Last point must match the first.

attribute.name: TargetType
attribute.semantics: Enumerations: SURFACE (1), SUBSURFACE (2), BOTH (3)

parameter.name: First_Location
parameter.semantics: Location of first endpoint in Earth-centered coordinates.

parameter.name: Obstacle_Type
parameter.semantics:
1 - Ditch
2 - Abati
3 - Crater
4 - Natural Barrier
5 - Anti-Tank Mine
6 - Wire (JCATS only)
7 - Bridge
8 - Anti-Personnel Mine (JCATS only)

parameter.name: Second_Location
parameter.semantics: Location of second endpoint in Earth-centered coordinates.

parameter.name: Width
parameter.semantics: The mine field starts at \"barrierBegin\" and extends to \"barrierEnd\" with a width of \"widthOfBarrier\". So, you have two endpoints and the width of the rectangle. The distance between the two endpoints is the length, and the direction between the endpoints is the orientation. Width of Obstacle in meters.

parameter.name: Obstacle_Encountered
parameter.semantics: the RTI object ID of the obstacle

arrayData.name: GeotileID
arrayData.semantics: The identification of a specific geotile within the Geotile Reference System (GTRS) String of up to 8 ASCII characters. Unused characters shall be indicated by Null (0) values.
